title: Was exodus 24 and 70/72 elders eating bread and wine on mountain seeing Yahweh the reflection of communion? Lechem ha panim? The 70 prophesying and eating bread and drinking wine?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: - is the lechem ha panim instituted to memorialize this? - turn the stones to bread, Exodus 24.4 twelve stones setup for the twelve tribes reflection of 12 ring shaped bread of lechem ha Panim  (Exodu
body:
- is the lechem ha panim instituted to memorialize this?
- turn the stones to bread, Exodus 24.4 twelve stones setup for the twelve tribes reflection of 12 ring shaped bread of lechem ha Panim 
(Exodus 24:4 OHBa וַיִּכְתֹּ֣ב מֹשֶׁ֗ה אֵ֚ת כָּל־דִּבְרֵ֣י יְהוָ֔ה וַיַּשְׁכֵּ֣ם בַּבֹּ֔קֶר וַיִּ֥בֶן מִזְבֵּ֖חַ תַּ֣חַת הָהָ֑ר וּשְׁתֵּ֤ים עֶשְׂרֵה֙ מַצֵּבָ֔ה לִשְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָׂ֖ר שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ )
- is an altar so adding associated with this?
- 12 living Stones? Living Stones 12 apostles take bread and wine...
- 12 items/stones/pillars (מַצֵּבָה) (Peter's name is stone or Rock) set up as alter by Moshe mediator, with another set of 70/72 present
- the three apostles are said to be pillars. Is James the brother of Yeshua appointed to replace James the son of Zebedee?
- one of the only times in Scripture all of the old testament where blood goes on the people (circa wine), and the bulls (meat/flesh) are shlameem offerings (also called Thanksgiving offerings)
- Moshe says to the people look this is the blood of the covenant (Exodus 24:8 LEB And Moses took the blood and sprinkled it on the people, and he said, “Look, the blood of the covenant that Yahweh has made with you in accordance with all these words.” (Exodus 24:8 HB2 24:8 וַיִּקַּח מֹשֶׁה אֶת־הַדָּם וַיִּזְרֹק עַל־הָעָם וַיֹּאמֶר הִנֵּה דַם־הַבְּרִית אֲשֶׁר צִוָּה אֲלֵיכֶם אֱלֹהִים עַל כָּל־הַדְּבָרִים הָאֵלֶּה:)
- Exodus 24:9-11 LEB 9 And Moses and Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, and seventy from the elders of Israel went up. 10 And they saw the God of Israel, and what was under his feet was like sapphire tile work and like the very heavens for clearness. 11 And toward the leaders of the Israelites he did not stretch out his hand, and they beheld God, and they ate, and they drank. (Exodus 24:9-11 HB2 9 24:9 וַיַּעַל מֹשֶׁה וְאַהֲרֹן נָדָב וַאֲבִיהוּא וְשִׁבְעִים מִזִּקְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל: 10 24:10 וַיִּרְאוּ אֵת אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל וְתַחַת רַגְלָיו כְּמַעֲשֵׂה לִבְנַת הַסַּפִּיר וּכְעֶצֶם הַשָּׁמַיִם לָטֹהַר: 11 24:11 וְאֶל־אֲצִילֵי בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל לֹא שָׁלַח יָדוֹ וַיֶּחֱזוּ אֶת־הָאֱלֹהִים וַיֹּאכְלוּ וַיִּשְׁתּוּ:)
- Moshe ascends to the top of the mountain to get the real bread (the words of the living God) and this process takes him 40 days and 40 nights. This mirrors Yeshua in the wilderness, and this mirrors Yeshua in the post Resurrection journeying before the 10-day Ascent to the throne and the descent at Shavuot/ Pentecost 
- Moshe goes into the fire comes out looking like a god. The second higher Moshe has the authority to send the fire down in the New covenant onto 120 altars. 
- is chapter 25 the construction of shadow memorializations of yahweh's movements on the mountain and Israel's movements in response to the words delivered from the mountain and the dining of the elders in chapter 24? Like are the items  enumerated in chapter 25 physical constructs based on the pattern of what transpired and took place in chapter 24? 
- chapter 25.29&30 bowls and ladles for libations for wine and on the table bread of the presence/face always
content:
- is the lechem ha panim instituted to memorialize this?
- turn the stones to bread, Exodus 24.4 twelve stones setup for the twelve tribes reflection of 12 ring shaped bread of lechem ha Panim 
(Exodus 24:4 OHBa וַיִּכְתֹּ֣ב מֹשֶׁ֗ה אֵ֚ת כָּל־דִּבְרֵ֣י יְהוָ֔ה וַיַּשְׁכֵּ֣ם בַּבֹּ֔קֶר וַיִּ֥בֶן מִזְבֵּ֖חַ תַּ֣חַת הָהָ֑ר וּשְׁתֵּ֤ים עֶשְׂרֵה֙ מַצֵּבָ֔ה לִשְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָׂ֖ר שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ )
- is an altar so adding associated with this?
- 12 living Stones? Living Stones 12 apostles take bread and wine...
- 12 items/stones/pillars (מַצֵּבָה) (Peter's name is stone or Rock) set up as alter by Moshe mediator, with another set of 70/72 present
- the three apostles are said to be pillars. Is James the brother of Yeshua appointed to replace James the son of Zebedee?
- one of the only times in Scripture all of the old testament where blood goes on the people (circa wine), and the bulls (meat/flesh) are shlameem offerings (also called Thanksgiving offerings)
- Moshe says to the people look this is the blood of the covenant (Exodus 24:8 LEB And Moses took the blood and sprinkled it on the people, and he said, “Look, the blood of the covenant that Yahweh has made with you in accordance with all these words.” (Exodus 24:8 HB2 24:8 וַיִּקַּח מֹשֶׁה אֶת־הַדָּם וַיִּזְרֹק עַל־הָעָם וַיֹּאמֶר הִנֵּה דַם־הַבְּרִית אֲשֶׁר צִוָּה אֲלֵיכֶם אֱלֹהִים עַל כָּל־הַדְּבָרִים הָאֵלֶּה:)
- Exodus 24:9-11 LEB 9 And Moses and Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, and seventy from the elders of Israel went up. 10 And they saw the God of Israel, and what was under his feet was like sapphire tile work and like the very heavens for clearness. 11 And toward the leaders of the Israelites he did not stretch out his hand, and they beheld God, and they ate, and they drank. (Exodus 24:9-11 HB2 9 24:9 וַיַּעַל מֹשֶׁה וְאַהֲרֹן נָדָב וַאֲבִיהוּא וְשִׁבְעִים מִזִּקְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל: 10 24:10 וַיִּרְאוּ אֵת אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל וְתַחַת רַגְלָיו כְּמַעֲשֵׂה לִבְנַת הַסַּפִּיר וּכְעֶצֶם הַשָּׁמַיִם לָטֹהַר: 11 24:11 וְאֶל־אֲצִילֵי בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל לֹא שָׁלַח יָדוֹ וַיֶּחֱזוּ אֶת־הָאֱלֹהִים וַיֹּאכְלוּ וַיִּשְׁתּוּ:)
- Moshe ascends to the top of the mountain to get the real bread (the words of the living God) and this process takes him 40 days and 40 nights. This mirrors Yeshua in the wilderness, and this mirrors Yeshua in the post Resurrection journeying before the 10-day Ascent to the throne and the descent at Shavuot/ Pentecost 
- Moshe goes into the fire comes out looking like a god. The second higher Moshe has the authority to send the fire down in the New covenant onto 120 altars. 
- is chapter 25 the construction of shadow memorializations of yahweh's movements on the mountain and Israel's movements in response to the words delivered from the mountain and the dining of the elders in chapter 24? Like are the items  enumerated in chapter 25 physical constructs based on the pattern of what transpired and took place in chapter 24? 
- chapter 25.29&30 bowls and ladles for libations for wine and on the table bread of the presence/face always
